title: dactylophyllum aureum
intro: Dactylophyllum aureum, also known as golden bird's eye, is a small shrub native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its high concentration of essential oils. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Dactylophyllum aureum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
